cit.note: Standard CIT 22%; petroleum 78% (22% ordinary + 56% special tax); financial institutions +5%

income_tax.note: 22% flat rate on ordinary income; trinnskatt bracket surcharge on gross salary

vat.note: MVA: 25% standard; 15% food; 12% passenger transport, hotels, culture and sport

employer_ni.note: Arbeidsgiveravgift varies by geographic zone; zone 1 (Oslo/urban) = 14.1%

otp_pension.note: Mandatory OTP occupational pension; minimum 2% of salary above 1G (NOK 124028 in 2025)
